one_time_description: Income allocations from Nation Businesses (Uujo Development L.P. and related entities) of $2,200,395 recognized via modified equity method
economic_notes: Band owned companies include gravel quarry, rental properties, cattle limited partnership, and Uujo Development L.P. (formerly Doig River Timber LP and Alamo Contracting LP). 16.6% interest in Six Nations Ventures L.P. Community Development Trust established 2016 managing Heritage Trust Fund and Agriculture Benefits Claim settlement.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is BC not AB. Consolidated entities include Doig River Cattle L.P., Doig River Not For Profit Trust, and Community Development Trust. GBEs (modified equity method) include Six Nations Ventures L.P. (16.6%), Uujo Development L.P. (100%), and Uujo Management G.P. Ltd. (100%). Large income allocation of $2,200,395 from Nation businesses (primarily Uujo Development L.P.) boosted surplus significantly. ISC Treaty Land Entitlement debt of $6,159,934 and Due to Doig S.E.D. Trust of $956,615 are significant liabilities. Deferred revenue of $1,726,841 appeared for first time in 2020. Agriculture Benefits Claim settlement and Heritage Trust Fund distributions to members noted. Accumulated remeasurement losses of $114,801 at year end. No schedule of remuneration found in provided text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
